Pianist · Composer

Andy Rochmol

Classical, jazz, and original work — in one voice, at eleven years old.

Bilingual EN / ES · Composes for orchestra

The Headline

He's shared the bench with El Piano de América.

Andy performed alongside Raúl Di Blasio — the pianist who's played duets with Richard Clayderman, Juan Gabriel and Julio Iglesias. Stepping onto that stage at his age, and holding it, tells you what kind of artist this is.

[ PHOTO / VIDEO with Di Blasio — add date, venue & the piece here ]

Watch Him Play

See it for yourself.

▶ Open on YouTube ↗

He Performs

Across every room.

  • Andy's Rockin' Jazz — rock & pop classics reworked through jazz, led from the piano
  • Live at NAMM — I Got Rhythm, Tristeza (Oscar Peterson), A Hard Day's Night
  • Standards on record — Autumn Leaves, Take Five
  • National TV — featured on Univision Miami

He Writes

His own music.

  • First composition at 5 — written for his father
  • A string quartet at 9 — scored by hand, recorded by Bellas Artes musicians
  • His first symphony — premiered in New York City
  • 1st in category — Charleston International Piano Competition

Let's Talk

A real artist — worth a conversation.

For collaboration, mentorship, or performances.

Get in Touch
